global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with food-related elements and promotional text.

elements.label: orange gradient background
elements.description: A smooth orange gradient background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: SnapMeal logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the word 'SnapMeal' in a bold font, positioned at the top left.

elements.label: SALE badge
elements.description: A small, circular badge with the word 'SALE' in bold, yellow text on a contrasting background.

elements.label: food icons
elements.description: Two outlined icons representing food items, centered in the middle of the ad.

elements.label: food description
elements.description: Text that reads 'Fast food, fast' in a large, bold font, centrally located.

elements.label: deal description
elements.description: Smaller text below the main description that says 'Late-night deals available' in a clean font.

elements.label: $4.99 price
elements.description: A prominent price tag displaying '$4.99' in a bold font, located towards the bottom.

elements.label: Order now button
elements.description: A bright button with the text 'Order now' in a clear, inviting font, positioned at the bottom.

elements.label: small circles
elements.description: Two small, empty circles positioned near the food icons, adding a decorative touch.

elements.label: unknown element
elements.description: An element with no specific visual description available.
elements.text_content: Fast food, fast Late-night deals available $4.99 Order now

elements.label: SnapMeal headline
elements.description: The word 'SnapMeal' displayed prominently at the top of the ad.

elements.label: SALE badge
elements.description: A small badge indicating a sale, positioned at the top right corner.
